creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
On my PR #213140, namely one from 2016 to update net/tcpkali to 1.0, has gotten spam messages since late 2020. I no longer maintain net/tcpkali.

These messages are advertising shady sites, or pirated Android APK downloads.

Could PR #213140 get locked and the spam messages get removed (Comment #2 and below except for my comment #8.
